task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top right corner of the Redmine interface should display 'Logged in as admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the version settings for the 'Orbital Platform' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Orbital Platform' project settings page with the 'Versions' tab active, or the specific edit page for the 'Phase 1 Launch' version.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Phase 1 Launch' version is configured to be shared with subprojects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the version edit page, the 'Sharing' dropdown for 'Phase 1 Launch' is set to 'With subprojects', 'With project hierarchy', 'With project tree', or 'With all projects', and a success flash message indicates the setting was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Main Thruster Design' issue within the 'Propulsion System' subproject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the issue details or edit form for the 'Main Thruster Design' issue under the 'Propulsion System' project.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Main Thruster Design' issue is assigned to the 'Phase 1 Launch' version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Target version' field for the issue is set to 'Phase 1 Launch' and the issue is saved, showing the updated target version on the issue details page along with a success message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated through the application to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like clicking 'Settings', 'Versions', 'Issues', and 'Edit', rather than just jumping to a final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply edit the HTML to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of standard Redmine success flash messages (e.g., 'Successful update.') after form submissions, and consistent UI state across screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent project: 'Orbital Platform'. Subproject: 'Propulsion System'. Version: 'Phase 1 Launch'. Issue: 'Main Thruster Design'. Valid sharing settings for the version to be visible to the subproject are 'With subprojects' (descendants), 'With project hierarchy' (hierarchy), 'With project tree' (tree), or 'With all projects' (system).
